seat_width.description: Width of the chair seat (left to right)

seat_depth.description: Depth of the chair seat (front to back)

seat_height.description: Height from ground to top of seat

leg_top_radius.description: Radius of leg at the top (wider end)

leg_bottom_radius.description: Radius of leg at the bottom (tapered end)

back_post_height.description: Height of backrest above the seat

back_angle.description: Angle of backrest tilt in degrees (for comfort)

back_slat_count.description: Number of horizontal slats in the backrest

back_slat_width.description: Width of each horizontal back slat

back_slat_height.description: Vertical height of each back slat

stretcher_radius.description: Radius of support stretchers between legs

stretcher_position.description: Position of stretchers as fraction of leg height (0-1)
